# Vendored viewer libraries

Committed (not CDN-loaded) so the generated map HTML is fully self-contained
and opens offline. Pinned versions in the filenames; update deliberately.

| File | Project | Version | License | Source |
|------|---------|---------|---------|--------|
| `sigma-2.4.0.min.js` | [sigma.js](https://github.com/jacomyal/sigma.js) | 2.4.0 | MIT | cdnjs `sigma.js/2.4.0/sigma.min.js` |
| `graphology-0.25.4.umd.min.js` | [graphology](https://github.com/graphology/graphology) | 0.25.4 | MIT | cdnjs `graphology/0.25.4/graphology.umd.min.js` |

Both MIT © their respective authors (sigma.js: Sciences-Po médialab & OuestWare;
graphology: Guillaume Plique). Full license texts in the upstream repositories.
